CREATE TABLE geo_shapes (id VARCHAR, shape GEOMETRY);
SELECT id, bif:GeometryType(shape) FROM geo_shapes WHERE shape IS NOT NULL ORDER BY id ASC;
SELECT a.id, bif:GeometryType(a.shape) FROM geo_shapes AS a JOIN geo_shapes AS b ON a.id <> b.id WHERE bif:GeometryType(b.shape) = 'POINT' ORDER BY a.id;
SELECT id, bif:GeometryType(shape) FROM (SELECT id, shape FROM geo_shapes WHERE shape CONTAINS 'POINT(1 3)') AS subquery ORDER BY id;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS type_count, bif:GeometryType(shape) FROM geo_shapes GROUP BY bif:GeometryType(shape) HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
WITH shapes AS (SELECT shape FROM geo_shapes) SELECT bif:GeometryType(shape) FROM shapes WHERE shape IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE other_shapes (id VARCHAR, shape GEOMETRY);
SELECT a.id, bif:GeometryType(a.shape), b.id FROM geo_shapes AS a LEFT JOIN other_shapes AS b ON a.id = b.id WHERE bif:GeometryType(a.shape) IS NOT NULL ORDER BY a.id;
SELECT bif:GeometryType(shape) FROM geo_shapes WHERE shape AS shape_value AND shape_value IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1;
